# Analytical Techniques

**Summary**: Chemical analysis of mineral components in biological shells to determine elemental ratios.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-alsadah|Alsadah, 2024]] used analytical techniques to measure Mg/Ca and Na/Ca ratios in foraminiferal calcite.

## Key Results and Findings
